T0030.title: High-Value Promo Exploit
T0030.description: In marketing fraud scenarios, this typically refers to a platform bonus or loophole with a high profit margin.
T0030.usageExample: Bought something over 2500 using an xx card starting with 37, got 137 off. Found a ride-share driver, three accounts done. Got a huge lamb leg today, hahaha. There are still spots left, forum friends, go go go!!! Share if it works for you. In this example, a bonus hunter uses a credit card promotion or a specific transaction strategy to gain significant economic benefits, which they call a 'lamb leg.'
